text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Yikes, I think I goofed! Did I double book
myself?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
So the party at the shopping district, right?
There's Hardcore Tag, and I'm also supposed to
be at Granny Runway... then there's Disco vs.
Club too!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, we could just group them all into one big
festival! That sounds hype! All right!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Think Palmster'll come too? And then there's
swing guy and his doggo... I should invite the
alien who landed on the beach too!
